figures.round3_verification: Round-2 FAIL RESOLVED on both axes. (1) PNG re-render now shows clean x-axis ticks ('1, 10^0, 10^4, 10^8, 10^12, 10^16, 10^20') with NO 'logμs' tick artifact; the locus vertical line and its annotation have been removed (per round-2 fix description). x-axis explicitly clamped to [10^0, 10^20] GeV with autorange=False. (2) Caption in paper_draft.tex (lines 645-663) has been rewritten to describe the actual rendered figure: left-panel four N_f curves in steel-blue solid / amber dashed / berry dotted / cool-grey dash-dotted, with Λ_obs horizontal anchor and M_Pl vertical anchor; right-panel continuous Cividis heatmap of log10(Λ^emerg/Λ_obs) with TWO contour overlays — steel-blue at |log10 ratio| = 1 (resolved boundary) and amber at log10 ratio ≃ 60 (reproduced boundary). No 'green/yellow/red' verdict-band words remain in the caption. The classical CC problem (>10^120 excess at Λ_UV ≃ M_Pl, N_f = 16) is correctly stated. FAIL → PASS.

summary: Round-3 verification: All round-2 blockers resolved. fig_lambda_emerg_parameter_scan caption in paper_draft.tex (lines 645-663) has been rewritten to drop 'green/yellow/red' verdict-band nomenclature and now describes the actual rendered figure (4 N_f linestyle-differentiated curves + 2-contour overlay on continuous Cividis heatmap). The 'logμs' tick rendering artifact is gone in the regenerated PNG (locus vline removed; x-axis clamped to [10^0, 10^20] GeV). All 4 round-1 FAILs are now PASS. The 3 round-1 MINOR cosmetic issues (SFDM cluster-label collision, BBN annotation overlap + rotated labels, EP η annotation overlap + rotated labels) all persist as cosmetic WARNs; per Stage 9 round-3 pass criterion these are advisory only and non-blocking.
recommendations: ADVISORY (defer to Stage 14 polish, non-blocking for Stage 13): SFDM cluster-label staggering with vertical y-offsets to break the A520/El Gordo/Bullet visual clump.
